    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddTagController
    Controller for the Add Tag dialog (AddTag.fxml).
    AdminController
    Controller for the admin subsystem.
    Album
    Represents a named album containing references to Photo objects.
    AlbumController
    Controller for the album detail screen.
    AlbumsController
    Controller for the user's album list screen.
    AppState
    Singleton holding application-wide session state shared across controllers.
    DataStore
    Handles all persistence for the Photos application using Java serialization (ObjectOutputStream / ObjectInputStream).
    LoginController
    Controller for the login screen.
    Photo
    Represents one physical photo on disk.
    Photos
    Main JavaFX entry point for the Photos application.
    SceneRouter
    Utility for switching scenes on a Stage.
    SearchController
    Controller for the search screen.
    Tag
    An immutable (name, value) tag pair, e.g.
    User
    Represents a single application user and all of their albums.
